entries.title: Efficient Transformer Architecture for On-Device LLM Inference
entries.summary: We present a novel transformer architecture that enables efficient LLM inference on edge devices with 4x speedup.

entries.title: Zero-Knowledge Proofs for DeFi Protocol Verification
entries.summary: A framework for verifying DeFi protocol correctness using zero-knowledge proofs without revealing proprietary strategies.

entries.title: Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning for Autonomous Trading
entries.summary: Multi-agent RL system for coordinating autonomous trading strategies across multiple exchanges.
